texto: No sublime wisdom asks to be worshipped or served
autor: the greatest and the most honourable masters are those who refuse to have slaves!
explicacao: Citação de the greatest and the most honourable masters are those who refuse to have slaves! sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “No sublime wisdom asks to be worshipped or served” articula reflexao, mehmet-murat-ildan, sublime em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
